Register a list of widgets for all new editor instances per default

```tsx
import { setDefaultWidgets } from '@sagold/react-json-editor';
 import widgets from '@sagold/rje-mantine-widgets';
 setDefaultWidgets(widgets);
```

## Parameters

### `widgets`

## Returns

**`void`**
